description: Deploy the Docker Example Voting App, a multi-container application with 5 services: vote (Python frontend), redis (queue), worker (.NET), db (Postgres), and result (Node.js viewer). The application configuration is located at /home/ga/voting-app/. Ensure all containers are running and verify the deployment by accessing the vote UI at http://localhost:5001 and the results viewer at http://localhost:5002.
